reviews.author: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Absolutely loved my experience at Evermore! The bracelet is stunning and Lauren made the whole process so special. I can't stop staring at my wrist!

reviews.author: Jessica T.
reviews.text: Best gift I've ever given myself. The permanent bracelet is delicate and perfect. It's survived the beach, pool, and shower without any issues. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Amanda K.
reviews.text: We brought our whole group for a bachelorette party — such a unique and memorable experience. Everyone left with beautiful jewelry and huge smiles. Will definitely be back!

reviews.author: Rachel B.
reviews.text: Lauren is so talented and professional. The studio is gorgeous and the whole process is completely painless. I'll be back for an anklet next!

reviews.author: Melissa C.
reviews.text: Came in for an ear piercing and it was the best experience I've ever had. Clean, professional, and the result is perfect. The studio is absolutely beautiful too!

reviews.author: Katie W.
reviews.text: I was a little nervous but the whole team made me feel so comfortable. My permanent necklace is absolutely gorgeous. Worth every single penny!

_instructions: To update reviews: copy real 5-star review text from Google Maps into this file. Keep the same JSON structure. The reviews carousel on the homepage pulls from this file via JavaScript.
